category_sources: Official Thanos site and GitHub repository describe the same Prometheus long-term storage and high-availability role.
source_facts.description says it is a highly available Prometheus setup with long term storage capabilities.
display_name_sources: Official site title and GitHub repository use Thanos.
docs_sources: Official Thanos site provides getting-started documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Thanos site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository identifies Thanos as a CNCF project for Prometheus high availability and long-term storage.
source_facts.description names Prometheus, high availability, and long-term storage.
